series_metadata.series_description: Records related to projects involving minor or major alterations to Ohio Attorney General (AGO) office work space in buildings leased or owned by the AGO. Records include, but not limited to, communication from vendors regarding project, drawings, photos, floor plans, copies of invoices, scope of work, purchase orders, agreements and copies of contracts.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 7 years from close of project. ; Paper: Retain 7 years from close of project. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
